mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_competency_diagnosis (user_id, diagnosis_type, created_at) VALUES (#{userSn}, 'AI_COACHING', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6))
INSERT INTO sys_ai_report (user_id, diagnosis_id, report_type) VALUES (#{userSn}, #{diagnosisId}, #{reportType})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_ai_report SET content = #{content} WHERE report_id = #{reportId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_report_competency (report_id, fit_type, group_code, level_code, name, my_score, required_score, status, icon, comment, sort_order) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{c.fitType}, #{c.groupCode}, #{c.levelCode}, #{c.name}, #{c.myScore}, #{c.requiredScore}, #{c.status}, #{c.icon}, #{c.comment}, #{c.sortOrder})

INSERT INTO sys_report_activity (report_id, cfi_score, summary_title, summary_text, keyword_badges, criteria_summary) VALUES (#{reportId}, #{cfiScore}, #{summaryTitle}, #{summaryText}, #{keywordBadges}, #{criteriaSummary}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE cfi_score = VALUES(cfi_score), summary_title = VALUES(summary_title), summary_text = VALUES(summary_text), keyword_badges = VALUES(keyword_badges), criteria_summary = VALUES(criteria_summary)
